commands.name: last_vacation_photo
commands.intent: get the last photo of the vacation
commands.returns: The caption of the last vacation photo placeholder (golden-hour Miradouro shot).
commands.learned_from: Conversation with Claude, 2026-07-18 — front-end query 'get the last vacation photo'.

commands.name: recent_okf_feed
commands.intent: show my recent knowledge feed items
aliases: mes derniers items de la mémoire

resolver.note: Live data via MCP — not cached in the knowledge base.

commands.returns: One page of OKF feed items (title, summary, kind) from the live artifact feed.
commands.learned_from: Conversation with Claude, 2026-07-18 — demonstrating an MCP-backed resolver.
